title: The Bride of Glomdal
writer: Jacob Breda Bull, Carl Theodor Dreyer
actors: Einar Sissener, Tove Tellback, Stub Wiberg
plot: Tore takes over the rundown family farm. Applying his youthful energy, he intends to make it into a big farm like Glomgården on the other side of the river, where beautiful Berit lives. Tore falls in love with her, but her father ...
